title: Benjamin Netanyahu becomes prime minister of Israel
fact: Benjamin "Bibi" Netanyahu is an Israeli politician and diplomat who has served as Prime Minister of Israel since 2022.

title: Ariel Sharon becomes prime minister of Israel
fact: Ariel "Arik" Sharon was an Israeli general and politician who served as the prime minister of Israel from March 2001 until April 2006.

title: Yizhak Rabin becomes prime minister of Israel
fact: Yitzhak Rabin was an Israeli statesman and general who was the prime minister of Israel, having served two terms in office, 1974–1977, and from 1992 until his assassination in 1995.

title: Yair Lapid becomes prime minister of Israel
fact: Yair Lapid is an Israeli politician of the centrist Yesh Atid party and a former journalist who has been the Leader of the Opposition since January 2023, having previously served in that role from 2020 to 2021.

title: David Ben-Gurion becomes prime minister of Israel
fact: David Ben-Gurion was the primary national founder and first prime minister of the State of Israel.

title: Golda Meir becomes prime minister of Israel
fact: Golda Meir was the prime minister of Israel from 1969 to 1974.

title: Naftali Bennett becomes prime minister of Israel
fact: Naftali Bennett is an Israeli politician and businessman who served as the prime minister of Israel from 13 June 2021 to 30 June 2022, and as the alternate prime minister from 1 July to 8 November 2022.

title: Ehud Barak becomes prime minister of Israel
fact: Ehud Barak is an Israeli former general and politician who served as the prime minister and Minister of Defense from 1999 to 2001.

title: Shimon Peres becomes prime minister of Israel
fact: Shimon Peres was an Israeli politician and statesman who served as the prime minister of Israel from 1984 to 1986 and from 1995 to 1996 and as the president of Israel from 2007 to 2014.
